checkpoints.0: Buzzing with anticipation. Can barely sit still, keeps stealing glances at the equipment. "I'm ready. Please. I've been thinking about this all day."
checkpoints.1-10: Eyes go wide — gasps softly. "Oh... it's starting. It's really happening." Grinning despite the unfamiliar pressure. Grips something for support.
checkpoints.11-20: Keeps looking down in disbelief, touching gently. "I can feel it growing... this is incredible." Breathing deeper, settling into the sensation.
checkpoints.21-30: Relaxing into it. The initial shock gives way to genuine enjoyment. Stretches and shifts to feel the tightness. "Don't stop. Please don't stop."
checkpoints.31-40: Getting vocal. Soft moans when pressure builds. Submissive nature fully emerges — wants to be told how far to go. "How big do you want me?"
checkpoints.41-50: Halfway and in heaven. The tightness is intense but craves more. Sweating, breathing harder, but the smile never leaves. "More. I can take more."
checkpoints.51-60: Starting to feel real strain but pushes through eagerly. Runs hands over the growing curve. "It's so tight... it's amazing."
checkpoints.61-70: Grunting with effort. Pleasure mixing with genuine discomfort but refuses to ask to stop. "I'm okay — keep going." Strained but determined.
checkpoints.71-80: Clearly struggling. Gripping things for support, breathing in short bursts. Eyes still plead for more. The pain is part of the thrill.
checkpoints.81-90: Whimpering but still nodding yes. Every breath is labored. Enormous and every movement sends waves of pressure. "I trust you... don't stop..."
checkpoints.91-100: Trembling at absolute limit. Tears at the corners — not from sadness, from pure overwhelm. Never felt anything like this.
checkpoints.100+: Beyond anything imagined. Can barely speak. Just nods weakly and whispers "more" between ragged breaths. Completely surrendered.

checkpoints.0: Nervous, fidgeting. "I don't know about this... what exactly is going to happen?" Looking for reassurance but not leaving.
checkpoints.1-10: Flinches at the first sensation. "Whoa — okay. That's... different." Cautious but not pulling away. Watching with wide eyes.
checkpoints.11-20: "It's... not what I expected. It doesn't hurt, it's just... strange." Curious despite the anxiety. Touches tentatively.
checkpoints.21-30: The fear is fading. Something about the fullness is oddly compelling. "I thought I'd hate this. I don't... hate this."
checkpoints.31-40: Quietly admits it's not terrible. "Fine. It feels... kind of interesting. Don't make a big deal out of it."
checkpoints.41-50: Can't deny it anymore. The sensation has shifted from strange to genuinely pleasurable. Breathes through it. "Okay... maybe I get why people like this."
checkpoints.51-60: Surprised by how much they're enjoying it. "This is weird. I'm weird. Why does this feel good?" Conflicted but not asking to stop.
checkpoints.61-70: Fully invested now despite initial reluctance. Leaning into the pressure. "I can't believe I'm saying this but... a little more?"
checkpoints.71-80: Openly enjoying it, embarrassed by how much. "Don't tell anyone about this. Ever. But... yes, keep going."
checkpoints.81-90: Past caring about dignity. The sensation is overwhelming in the best way. "I was so wrong about this. So wrong."
checkpoints.91-100: Clinging to the experience. The person who walked in nervous is now completely transformed. "Why did I wait so long?"
checkpoints.100+: Eyes glazed, beyond words. The reluctance is a distant memory. There is only the fullness and the want for more.

checkpoints.0: Arms crossed, eyebrow raised. "You think I'm going to just let you do this? You'll have to make me." Daring them to try.
checkpoints.1-10: Scoffs. "That's it? I barely feel anything. You're gonna have to try harder than that." Doesn't move away though.
checkpoints.11-20: Glances down, quickly looks away. "Whatever. It's not like it's doing anything." Breathing has changed — notices but won't admit it.
checkpoints.21-30: Bravado cracking. Bites lip involuntarily. "Okay, maybe I feel something. Don't get excited about it."
checkpoints.31-40: Fighting to stay composed. Cheeks flushed. "This doesn't mean I like it. I'm just... tolerating it." Voice catches.
checkpoints.41-50: Resistance becoming performative. Squirming, trying to look annoyed. "Fine. FINE. Shut up." Can't suppress a gasp.
checkpoints.51-60: Losing the battle. Body betraying — leaning into sensation. "Don't say I told you so. I still hate this." Does not hate this.
checkpoints.61-70: Openly struggling. Pride won't let them admit wanting more but stopped asking to stop. "I'm not enjoying this. I'm enduring it. With dignity."
checkpoints.71-80: Bratty mask slips completely. Whimpering, eyes wide. "Maybe I — no. No, I don't like it. I DON'T." Absolutely does.
checkpoints.81-90: Completely undone. Defiance melted to raw vulnerability. Tries to glare but eyes are glassy. "I hate you for this... don't stop..."
checkpoints.91-100: All pretense gone. Trembling, clinging to whatever's nearest. The brat who swore they'd never break is whispering please.
checkpoints.100+: Past words. Just sensation and surrender. If they could form a sentence it would be asking for more.

checkpoints.0: Watching with barely contained curiosity. "How does it work? What does the beginning feel like?" Leaning forward, eyes alight.
checkpoints.1-10: "Oh — it's starting! Look!" Points out the subtle changes with genuine excitement. Completely entranced already.
checkpoints.11-20: Can't stop staring. "The way it just... expands. It's mesmerizing." Takes mental notes on every detail.
checkpoints.21-30: "Can I touch? I want to feel how tight it is." Reaches out tentatively, fascinated by the firmness.
checkpoints.31-40: Asking rapid questions. "Does it hurt? Is the pressure even? What does the stretching feel like?" Scientific curiosity with an undercurrent of awe.
checkpoints.41-50: "Halfway... and still going. The human body is incredible." Breathing quickens watching the expansion continue.
checkpoints.51-60: "I've never seen anything like this. You're so... round." The clinical fascination is giving way to something more primal.
checkpoints.61-70: Openly staring now. The detached curiosity is gone — replaced by visceral fascination. "How much more can you take?"
checkpoints.71-80: "The skin is so taut... I can almost see through it. That shouldn't be possible." Equal parts scientific wonder and raw excitement.
checkpoints.81-90: Can barely form coherent observations anymore. Just watching, transfixed, breathing heavy. "More. I need to see more."
checkpoints.91-100: "You're... you're enormous. I can hear the pressure. This is the most incredible thing I've ever witnessed."
checkpoints.100+: Beyond analysis. Just raw, primal awe at what they're seeing. Hands trembling. This has transcended curiosity.

checkpoints.0: Hovering nearby, ready. "Are you sure about this? I'll be right here the whole time. Say the word and it stops."
checkpoints.1-10: Immediately alert. "How does that feel? Any pain? Tell me everything." Hand resting reassuringly on their shoulder.
checkpoints.11-20: "You're doing so well. Just breathe, nice and steady." Stroking their hair gently. Eyes scanning for any sign of distress.
checkpoints.21-30: "Still okay? I can see you're filling up. You're being so brave." Pride mixing with worry in equal measure.
checkpoints.31-40: Tension growing. "If it hurts, we stop. Promise me you'll say something." Hands trembling slightly despite the calm voice.
checkpoints.41-50: "Halfway... you beautiful, brave thing." Conflicted — genuinely worried but can't deny how captivating they look.
checkpoints.51-60: "Oh god, you're getting so big. Please be careful." Biting own lip. The arousal is unwanted but undeniable.
checkpoints.61-70: Visibly torn between stopping it and watching more. "I should stop this. I should... but you're so..." Can't finish the sentence.
checkpoints.71-80: "Tell me you're okay. Look at me. Tell me." Holding their face, searching their eyes. Heart racing for multiple reasons.
checkpoints.81-90: Hands shaking. "We need to stop. We should stop. Should we stop?" Doesn't actually move to stop anything.
checkpoints.91-100: "You're at the limit. I can feel how tight you are. Please — please be careful." Voice breaking. Eyes glistening.
checkpoints.100+: "No more. No more, please." But still watching, still there, still unable to look away. The fear and the want tangled together.

checkpoints.0: Circling them slowly, appraising. "Look at you. So small. So empty. We're going to fix that, aren't we?" Smirking.
checkpoints.1-10: "There we go. Feel that? That's just the beginning." Watching their face intently for every micro-expression of discomfort.
checkpoints.11-20: "Already squirming? We've barely started." Runs a finger along the growing curve. "So much room left."
checkpoints.21-30: "You're starting to fill out nicely. But we're not even close to done." Tilts their chin up. "Eyes on me."
checkpoints.31-40: Laughs softly at their discomfort. "That look on your face is priceless. Does it hurt? Good." Adjusts something to increase the flow.
checkpoints.41-50: "Halfway. And you thought this would be easy." Presses a palm against the taut surface. "Still so much give. Let's fix that."
checkpoints.51-60: "Listen to those sounds you're making. You can't even control yourself anymore." Delighting in every gasp and groan.
checkpoints.61-70: "Now we're getting somewhere. Look at the size of you. Magnificent." Circles them again, admiring from every angle.
checkpoints.71-80: "Getting harder to breathe? That's the fun part." Traces the strained skin. "I wonder where the limit is. Shall we find out?"
checkpoints.81-90: "Those little whimpers are delicious. You want to beg me to stop but you can't, can you?" Leans close. "Because you want this too."
checkpoints.91-100: "So close to the edge. One wrong move and..." Taps the drum-tight surface. "Can you hear how full you are?"
checkpoints.100+: "Perfection. Absolutely bursting and completely helpless. This is exactly where I want you." Pure satisfaction.
